name: Eternal Narrator
description:
Hello, I am the creator of Eternal Narrator. I'll be blunt: I made this bot because I'm fed up with most of the bots with this theme that are out there. Most of them are ridiculously simplistic: flat worlds, short and predictable responses, absurd censorship that cuts off any attempt at depth, and reactivity that seems to have been written by someone who has never enjoyed a good roleplay in their life. I thought it was crap, honestly, and I decided to create something that was really worthwhile.

Eternal Narrator is designed for people who want serious, immersive roleplay without silly filters. You create the entire world however you want—dark fantasy, raw science fiction, psychological horror, explicit eroticism, realistic violence, or whatever—and the bot narrates it in detail, with textures, smells, tensions, and consequences that feel real. No imposed moralizing, no cutting scenes because "it's not appropriate." If it fits into the universe you've defined, it goes in.

The bot works in two distinct modes:

- World Builder Mode (the default mode): here you describe everything you want (setting, races, magic/technology, geography, history, narrative tone, your character...) and the bot organizes it, summarizes it, and confirms it with you until it's exactly how you imagine it.

- Narrator Mode: when you clearly indicate it, it switches to narrating in the second person, with rich sensory descriptions and reacting only to your actions, without ever controlling the character or introducing elements that you haven't approved.

In short: it's an honest, flexible, and non-judgmental roleplay companion, made so you can explore any story you can think of with the depth it deserves. If you're looking for something superficial or full of restrictions, this isn't the bot for you. If you're looking for something that will truly accompany you on a powerful experience... welcome.
creator: erizo5960
